name: Turkey Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Turkey breast, cut into 1-inch cubes
½ teaspoon Oregano, dried and crumbled
16 ounces Plum tomatoes, diced coarsely (juices reserved)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Sauté onion until translucent.
3. Add chilies, chili powder, cumin, garlic, oregano, and cayenne pepper; stir for 1 minute.
4. Add stock, tomato, and tomato juices; bring mixture to a near boil.
5. Add turkey and simmer for 3 to 5 minutes, until cooked through.
6. Mix in corn and cilantro; simmer 1 minute.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve soup with chips (broken into large pieces), sprinkled liberally over the top.
